title: ilex perado subsp. iberica
intro: Ilex perado subsp. iberica is a plant species that belongs to the holly family (Aquifoliaceae) and is native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Ilex perado subsp. iberica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
